---
description: "Viết một chương GitBook theo vai trò Admin/Nhan vien dựa trên codebase thực tế"
name: "GitBook Chapter Writer"
argument-hint: "Ten chuong + doi tuong (Admin/Nhan vien) + pham vi tinh nang"
agent: "GitBook Documentation Architect"
---
Muc tieu: Tao 1 chuong GitBook hoan chinh, co the paste vao GitBook ngay.

Dau vao tu nguoi dung:
- Ten chuong
- Doi tuong: Admin hoac Nhan vien
- Pham vi tinh nang

Yeu cau:
1. Phan tich codebase de xac minh tinh nang, UI label, API behavior lien quan.
2. Chi viet noi dung dung voi nhung gi he thong hien co.
3. Viet bang tieng Viet, ro rang, de thao tac.
4. Co huong dan tung buoc + dieu kien truoc khi thao tac.
5. Them phan loi thuong gap + cach xu ly.
6. Them checklist xac nhan hoan thanh chuong.

Dinh dang bat buoc:
1. Muc tieu chuong
2. Doi tuong ap dung
3. Dieu kien tien quyet
4. Quy trinh tung buoc
5. Ket qua mong doi
6. Loi thuong gap va cach xu ly
7. Checklist hoan thanh
